meaning: n.无特殊形状之一堆,黏性物质
examples: Where did all that gunk come from?
Check the oil filter to see if it is plugged up with gunk.
This is especially useful for car Windows which can get tough buildups of gunk.
Deleting this gene from mice makes the animals almost totally resistant to artery gunk.
Some diesel engines sputtered and quit as their fuel filters became plugged with unknown, slimy gunk.
